name: Vegetable Chick Pea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast sesame seeds in a heated dry skillet over medium heat, shaking the pan or stirring until the seeds are light brown and fragrant, about 2-3 minutes.
2. Make the dressing by processing garlic, sesame seeds, salt, and pepper in a blender bowl or food processor. Blend in lemon juice and oil.
3. Cook carrots in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp tender, about 4 minutes; drain well.
4. Toss carrots with chick peas and dressing in a large bowl. Let cool to room temperature.
5. Add cucumber, parsley, and olives. Toss to coat with dressing. Serve at room temperature.
